mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.user_id, r.node_id, n.name AS node_name, r.name, r.metric_type, r.severity, r.threshold_percent, r.duration_seconds, r.cooldown_seconds, r.enabled, r.first_matched_at, r.last_triggered_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM notification_rules r LEFT JOIN nodes n ON n.id = r.node_id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.user_id, r.node_id, n.name AS node_name, r.name, r.metric_type, r.severity, r.threshold_percent, r.duration_seconds, r.cooldown_seconds, r.enabled, r.first_matched_at, r.last_triggered_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM notification_rules r LEFT JOIN nodes n ON n.id = r.node_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC

SELECT r.id, r.user_id, r.node_id, n.name AS node_name, r.name, r.metric_type, r.severity, r.threshold_percent, r.duration_seconds, r.cooldown_seconds, r.enabled, r.first_matched_at, r.last_triggered_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM notification_rules r LEFT JOIN nodes n ON n.id = r.node_id WHERE r.enabled = 1 AND ( r.node_id = #{nodeId} OR (r.node_id IS NULL AND r.user_id = #{ownerUserId}) )
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_rules SET node_id = #{nodeId}, name = #{name}, metric_type = #{metricType}, severity = #{severity}, threshold_percent = #{thresholdPercent}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, cooldown_seconds = #{cooldownSeconds}, enabled = #{enabled}, first_matched_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE notification_rules SET first_matched_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND first_matched_at IS NOT NULL
